case_title: GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION VS. BCM SERVICE & ENGINEERING, INC.,A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-23-2009 - CASE SETTLED AS PER PLTF'S ATTY'S FAXED LETTER AND TELEPHONE CONVERSATION. ORIGINAL NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE ACTION WILL BE MAILED TO THE COURT. ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON DEC-01-2009 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.
